name: qwen-openai-proxy
description: A proxy server that exposes Qwen models through an OpenAI-compatible API

scripts.start: npm run build:core && node dist/src/cli/qwen-proxy.js serve --headless
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && node dist/src/cli/qwen-proxy.js serve --headless
scripts.serve:headless: npm run build:core && node dist/src/cli/qwen-proxy.js serve --headless
scripts.auth:list: npm run build:core && node dist/authenticate.js list
scripts.auth:add: npm run build:core && node dist/authenticate.js add
scripts.auth:remove: npm run build:core && node dist/authenticate.js remove
scripts.auth:counts: npm run build:core && node dist/authenticate.js counts

author: Qwen Code Developer
